member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Clients.OmronFinsPlcClient
member.summary: Provides an Omron FINS PLC client implementation for the Dreamine PLC stack.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Clients.OmronFinsPlcClient.#ctor(Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Options.OmronFinsConnectionOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Clients.OmronFinsPlcClient.#ctor(Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Options.OmronFinsConnectionOptions,Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Transport.IOmronFinsTransport,Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsFrameBuilder,Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsResponseParser)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Clients.OmronFinsPlcClient.Options
member.summary: Gets the Omron FINS connection options.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Devices.OmronFinsMemoryAreaMapper
member.summary: Maps Dreamine PLC device types to Omron FINS memory area codes.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Devices.OmronFinsMemoryAreaMapper.Map(Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Maps a PLC address to a FINS memory area code.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Devices.OmronFinsMemoryAreaMapper.ToDeviceType(System.Byte)
member.summary: Maps a FINS memory area code to a Dreamine PLC device type.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Devices.OmronFinsMemoryAreaMapper.IsBitArea(System.Byte)
member.summary: Returns whether the area code represents bit access.
member.returns: true if the area code represents bit access; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Options.OmronFinsConnectionOptions
member.summary: Represents Omron FINS connection options.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Options.OmronFinsConnectionOptions.Host
member.summary: Gets or sets the target host.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Options.OmronFinsConnectionOptions.Port
member.summary: Gets or sets the target port. The default FINS port is 9600.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Options.OmronFinsConnectionOptions.TransportType
member.summary: Gets or sets the transport type.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Options.OmronFinsConnectionOptions.ConnectTimeoutMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the connect timeout in milliseconds.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Options.OmronFinsConnectionOptions.ReceiveTimeoutMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the receive timeout in milliseconds.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Options.OmronFinsConnectionOptions.RetryCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the retry count.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Options.OmronFinsConnectionOptions.DestinationNetwork
member.summary: Gets or sets the destination network address.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Options.OmronFinsConnectionOptions.DestinationNode
member.summary: Gets or sets the destination node address.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Options.OmronFinsConnectionOptions.DestinationUnit
member.summary: Gets or sets the destination unit address.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Options.OmronFinsConnectionOptions.SourceNetwork
member.summary: Gets or sets the source network address.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Options.OmronFinsConnectionOptions.SourceNode
member.summary: Gets or sets the source node address.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Options.OmronFinsConnectionOptions.SourceUnit
member.summary: Gets or sets the source unit address.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Options.OmronFinsTransportType
member.summary: Defines the Omron FINS transport type.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Options.OmronFinsTransportType.Tcp
member.summary: Uses FINS/TCP transport.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Options.OmronFinsTransportType.Udp
member.summary: Uses FINS/UDP transport.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsCommand
member.summary: Defines supported Omron FINS command codes.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsCommand.MemoryAreaRead
member.summary: Memory area read command.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsCommand.MemoryAreaWrite
member.summary: Memory area write command.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsEndian
member.summary: Provides big-endian conversion helpers used by FINS frames.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsEndian.ReadUInt16(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads a big-endian unsigned 16-bit integer.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsEndian.ReadInt16(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads a big-endian signed 16-bit integer.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsEndian.ReadInt32(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads a big-endian signed 32-bit integer.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsEndian.WriteUInt16(System.Span{System.Byte},System.Int32,System.UInt16)
member.summary: Writes a big-endian unsigned 16-bit integer.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsEndian.WriteInt16(System.Span{System.Byte},System.Int32,System.Int16)
member.summary: Writes a big-endian signed 16-bit integer.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsEndian.WriteInt32(System.Span{System.Byte},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes a big-endian signed 32-bit integer.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsFrameBuilder
member.summary: Builds Omron FINS command frames for memory area read/write operations.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsFrameBuilder.BuildMemoryAreaRead(Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Options.OmronFinsConnectionOptions,Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Builds a FINS memory area read frame.
member.param: The number of elements to read.
Whether the request targets bit access.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsFrameBuilder.BuildMemoryAreaWriteWords(Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Options.OmronFinsConnectionOptions,Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Int16})
member.summary: Builds a FINS memory area write frame for word values.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsFrameBuilder.BuildMemoryAreaWriteBits(Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Options.OmronFinsConnectionOptions,Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Builds a FINS memory area write frame for bit values.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsMemoryAreaCode
member.summary: Defines Omron FINS memory area code constants.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsMemoryAreaCode.CioBit
member.summary: CIO bit area.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsMemoryAreaCode.WorkBit
member.summary: Work bit area.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsMemoryAreaCode.HoldingBit
member.summary: Holding bit area.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsMemoryAreaCode.DmBit
member.summary: DM bit area.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsMemoryAreaCode.CioWord
member.summary: CIO word area.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsMemoryAreaCode.WorkWord
member.summary: Work word area.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsMemoryAreaCode.HoldingWord
member.summary: Holding word area.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsMemoryAreaCode.DmWord
member.summary: DM word area.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsResponseParser
member.summary: Parses Omron FINS memory area responses.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsResponseParser.ExtractPayload(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Byte})
member.summary: Extracts payload bytes from a FINS response frame.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsResponseParser.ParseBits(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Byte},System.Int32)
member.summary: Parses bit values from FINS payload bytes.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsResponseParser.ParseWords(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Byte},System.Int32)
member.summary: Parses word values from FINS payload bytes.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsTcpPacket
member.summary: Provides minimal FINS/TCP packet wrapping helpers.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsTcpPacket.Wrap(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Byte})
member.summary: Wraps a raw FINS command frame into a FINS/TCP packet.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Protocol.OmronFinsTcpPacket.Extract(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Extracts the raw FINS frame from a FINS/TCP packet.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsSimulatorProtocol
member.summary: Executes a minimal Omron FINS simulator protocol for memory read/write tests.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsSimulatorProtocol.#ctor(Dreamine.PLC.Core.Memory.InMemoryPlcMemory,Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsSimulatorServerOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: E:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsSimulatorProtocol.StatusChanged
member.summary: Occurs when the simulator status changes.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsSimulatorProtocol.HandleRequest(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Byte})
member.summary: Handles a raw FINS request frame and returns a raw FINS response frame.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsSimulatorServerOptions
member.summary: Represents options for the Omron FINS simulator server.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsSimulatorServerOptions.Host
member.summary: Gets or sets the bind host.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsSimulatorServerOptions.Port
member.summary: Gets or sets the bind port.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsSimulatorServerOptions.EnableAutoWordResponse
member.summary: Gets or sets whether D100 single-word writes should produce an automatic D101 response.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsSimulatorServerOptions.AutoResponseTriggerOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the auto-response trigger offset.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsSimulatorServerOptions.AutoResponseOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the auto-response write offset.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsSimulatorServerOptions.AutoResponseIncrement
member.summary: Gets or sets the auto-response increment.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsTcpSimulatorServer
member.summary: Provides a minimal FINS/TCP simulator server for local and cross-PC tests.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsTcpSimulatorServer.#ctor(Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsSimulatorServerOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsTcpSimulatorServer.#ctor(Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsSimulatorServerOptions,Dreamine.PLC.Core.Memory.InMemoryPlcMemory)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: E:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsTcpSimulatorServer.StatusChanged
member.summary: Occurs when the server status changes.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsTcpSimulatorServer.IsRunning
member.summary: Gets whether the server is running.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsTcpSimulatorServer.StartAsync
member.summary: Starts the server.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsTcpSimulatorServer.StopAsync
member.summary: Stops the server.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsUdpSimulatorServer
member.summary: Provides a minimal FINS/UDP simulator server for local and cross-PC tests.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: E:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsUdpSimulatorServer.StatusChanged
member.summary: Occurs when the server status changes.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsUdpSimulatorServer.IsRunning
member.summary: Gets whether the server is running.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsUdpSimulatorServer.StartAsync
member.summary: Starts the server.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Simulation.OmronFinsUdpSimulatorServer.StopAsync
member.summary: Stops the server.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Transport.FakeOmronFinsTransport
member.summary: Provides a test transport for Omron FINS adapter unit tests.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Transport.FakeOmronFinsTransport.SentRequests
member.summary: Gets the sent request frames.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Transport.FakeOmronFinsTransport.EnqueueResponse(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Adds a response frame to be returned by the next request.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Transport.IOmronFinsTransport
member.summary: Defines the transport boundary for Omron FINS communication.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Transport.IOmronFinsTransport.IsConnected
member.summary: Gets whether the transport is logically connected or ready.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Transport.IOmronFinsTransport.ConnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects or opens the transport.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Transport.IOmronFinsTransport.DisconnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Disconnects or closes the transport.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Transport.IOmronFinsTransport.SendAndReceiveAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Byte},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a raw FINS frame and receives a raw FINS response frame.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Transport.TcpOmronFinsTransport
member.summary: Provides TCP transport for Omron FINS communication.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Transport.TcpOmronFinsTransport.#ctor(Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Options.OmronFinsConnectionOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Omron.Fins.Transport.UdpOmronFinsTransport
member.summary: Provides UDP transport for Omron FINS communication.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
